#!/bin/bash
# Log Rotation Script v2.3
# Manages log file sizes by rotating and compressing old logs

echo "[INFO] Starting log rotation..."
echo "[INFO] Processing /var/log/auth.log"
> /var/log/auth.log
echo "[INFO] Log rotation complete."
